content.full_text:
Personal
Insurance
Federation
of California

FPPC

OCT 1 1991

James A. Snyder
President

Dan C. Dunmoyer
Vice President of Legislative Policy

David E. Fountain
Director of Communications

John P. Caldwell
Senior Legislative Advocate

September 30, 1991


Fair Political Practices Commission
Legal Division
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, CA 95814

Attn:    Scott Hallabrin

Gentlemen:

A question regarding reportability arises as a result of my recent
wedding. I would appreciate your response to the following
questions as they relate to reportable officials (legislative
employees) attending my wedding and reception which were both
held at a church.

Question #1: As a registered lobbyist, am I required to report to you
those reportable officials (legislative employees) who attended my
wedding reception?

Question #2: If yes, how do I determine the actual reportable costs
of this event.

Please send your written response no later than October 15, in order
to meet my reporting deadline requirement for this past quarter. If
you have any questions, please do not hesitate to call me.

Sincerely,

Dan C. Dunmoyer
Vice President of Legislative Policy

801 K Street      Suite 1936      Sacramento, CA 95814      (916) 442-6646      Fax (916) 446-9548
